title: Orbital Wolfs
description: Adds a Fishing Rod that can summon hundreds of wolfs | Inspiration from FlameFrags
body:
# Orbital Wolfs
## What the Mod Does
The Mod Adds the Fishing Rod that can summon/Teleport Wolfs to the payler from FlameFrags Videos.
## How to use it.
Ingame just use /Wolfrod to get the Fishing Rod
Then right klick and watch as the Wolfs Teleport!
